params.prompt: Mobile app UI mockup, 9:16 portrait, flat clean modern design, NO photos, NO people, NO 3D, NO device bezels — just the app UI filling the entire frame. Italian-language word-scramble game called Scramble. STYLE: Light mode. Background #F8F9FA. White card surfaces with soft drop shadow. Rounded corners: 14px on buttons, 22px on cards. Display font: Baloo 2 weight 800-900 for letters and numbers. Body font: Inter for labels. Primary accent color: vibrant violet #8B5CF6. Danger color #EF4444 red. Text color #111827. Muted #6B7280. LAYOUT TOP TO BOTTOM: (1) Slim app header 56px tall white background subtle bottom border: back arrow icon left, centered logo Blob Party Baloo 2 bold 700. (2) GameHUD strip white card: round badge 1/3 left, in center circular progress ring violet stroke around timer text 00:22, on right two stacked player chips violet Marco 18 amber Lisa 11. (3) Hint box light violet tinted background soft violet border: lightbulb icon + Italian text Tocca le tessere in ordine per comporre parole italiane, poi premi Invia. (4) WORD TRAY ROW with ERROR HIGHLIGHT: white card with 7 slots and a red #EF4444 border (1.5px solid) indicating error. Slots are EMPTY (just cleared after a wrong word). Slight motion-blur shake suggestion on the card. (5) Below the tray a red error text label centered: Parola non valida in bold Inter 700 red color. (6) TILES GRID: 7 large letter tiles in a row, white background, thick violet border, bold dark Baloo 2 letters R A T O S E I, all vibrant available state with soft shadows. (7) ACTIONS ROW: small square shuffle icon button, small square backspace ⌫ icon button, big primary submit button labeled Invia DISABLED state light grey background muted text since tray is empty. (8) Section header: bold Parole trovate on left, violet text 3 · 11 pt on right. (9) WORDS LIST white card with 3 rounded rows: top row STORIA bold +4 violet, second row ARIE bold +3 violet, third row RATO bold +4 violet. Generous spacing 8-12px, side padding 16px. Photorealistic UI render quality. No annotations or labels outside UI. Frame entire interface edge-to-edge.
